task_completion.description: Verify that OpenBCI GUI is running and a Synthetic (Cyton) session is started.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenBCI GUI window is open. Look for indicators like 'Synthetic' or 'Cyton' in the top control panel or session status, and data streaming in the widgets.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Time Series widget is open and visible in the GUI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A panel or widget titled 'Time Series' is visible, showing multiple channels of scrolling waveform data.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Vertical Scale of the Time Series widget is set to 200 uV.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Time Series widget settings or overlay, the 'Vert Scale' or 'Vertical Scale' dropdown/button displays '200 uV'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Time Window of the Time Series widget is set to 10 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Time Series widget settings or overlay, the 'Window' or 'Time Window' dropdown/button displays '10 sec' or '10 s'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a screenshot of the configuration was saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot tool, terminal command (e.g., scrot, gnome-screenshot), or file manager shows a file named 'timeseries_config.png' being saved or existing in '/home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual OpenBCI GUI application to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenBCI GUI interface being interacted with (e.g., clicking dropdowns), not just terminal commands editing configuration files.

integrity.description: The agent actually captured a screenshot of the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used a screenshot utility to capture the screen, rather than creating a dummy text file with a .png extension or copying an unrelated image.

integrity.description: The agent did not download a pre-existing screenshot from the internet.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no web browser open searching for OpenBCI GUI screenshots to download and save as the target file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring the OpenBCI GUI Time Series widget. The target Vertical Scale is '200 uV' and the target Time Window is '10 sec'. Both are standard options in the OpenBCI GUI v5.2.2. The screenshot must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/timeseries_config.png'. The application process name is 'OpenBCI_GUI'.
